name: Wii Startup Disc
description: A rare initialization disc used only on early pre-installed Wii consoles. It was required to complete system setup on certain launch units and was never sold at retail.

name: Wii Sports
description: A collection of motion-controlled sports games including Tennis, Bowling, Baseball, Boxing, and Golf. Bundled with most Wii consoles and widely credited for the system's global success.

name: Wii Play
description: A set of simple motion-controlled mini-games bundled with a Wii Remote, designed to teach players the basics of Wii controls.
